caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, and a large, grey, cone-shaped wig sits in a studio. He wears glasses and over-ear headphones while positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small framed photographs and clothing items. A red and white logo with the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" appears as an on-screen graphic on the left and right sides of the frame. As the scene progresses, the man remains seated and continues speaking, with slight shifts in his head position and facial expressions. His hands move slightly in front of him, though they remain mostly out of view. The lighting and setting remain constant throughout the sequence, focusing on the man as he engages in a recording session.
